title: Delete and Earn
hints: Notice that picking x affects only x-1 and x+1. This resembles the House Robber problem where adjacent choices conflict.
First, calculate the total points available for each unique number. Then, solve a dynamic programming problem on the range of possible values.
Define dp[i] as the max points using values up to i. The recurrence is dp[i] = max(dp[i-1], dp[i-2] + total_points[i]).
